CustomField.description: The total number of day an Opportunity is/was Open.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK( Date_Opportunity_Closed__c ) , NOW()- CreatedDate , Date_Opportunity_Closed__c - DATEVALUE( CreatedDate ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total number of days Opportunity is/was Open.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Age-MTM
